response.justification: James has strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency, and clear ownership mindset with open-source and operational contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of AI-native engineering or agentic code generation exposure despite mentioning MCP frameworks — his Python skills are unmentioned, and his current role at re:cinq is listed as starting in April 2025 (future-dated), raising red flags about resume accuracy.
strengths: Proven track record in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational and dev-ops ownership (CI/CD, Kubernetes, monitoring, on-call readiness implied)
Active contributor to open-source tooling and developer productivity (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, workshops)
concerns: No mention of Python expertise — critical must-have skill for the role
Current role at re:cinq listed as starting in April 2025 — likely a resume error or fabrication
Limited evidence of direct experience with AI-generated code or agentic systems beyond vague MCP mention
